about.title: About
about.intro: Background, current focus, and the editorial logic behind the site.

about.biographyMarkdown:
I work across machine learning, research tooling, and the infrastructure around trust: provenance, evaluation, and careful system design. 

This site is meant to be read as a research desk. Projects, notes, references, and attached materials all live in one place, so the work can be grounded in context.
about.currentFocusMarkdown:
## Current focus

- research systems and evidence-aware interfaces
- applied machine learning in scientific and healthcare contexts
- technical writing that captures method, tradeoffs, and iteration
- building archives of work instead of brochure sites
